ddls:
CREATE TABLE "symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Phonetic symbol */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the symbol */,
  "meaning" TEXT /* Meaning of the symbol */,
  "standard_ipa_equivalent" TEXT /* Standard IPA equivalent of the symbol */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the symbol's usage */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the symbol (e.g., standardized, custom, historical) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the symbol was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the symbol was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the symbol */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last modified the symbol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "family" TEXT /* Language family */,
  "dialects" TEXT /* Dialects of the language */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 639-3 code for the language */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the language is primarily spoken */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the language was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the language was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the language */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last modified the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_languages" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language that uses the symbol */,
  "usage_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of usage of the symbol in the language */,
  "context" TEXT /* Additional context for the usage of the symbol in the language */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the association was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the association was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the association */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last modified the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id", "language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the researcher (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Last date of activity in the system */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the researcher account was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the researcher account was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the account */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last modified the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol being revised */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who made the revision */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the revision */,
  "revision_type" TEXT /* Type of revision (e.g., addition, deletion, modification) */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the symbol before the revision */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the symbol after the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_revisions_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_revisions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_symbols" (
  "custom_symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom symbol */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Custom phonetic symbol */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the symbol */,
  "meaning" TEXT /* Meaning of the symbol */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the custom symbol (e.g., research, historical) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the custom symbol was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the custom symbol was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the custom symbol */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last modified the custom symbol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("custom_symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_symbols_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the category was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the category */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last modified the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_categories_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the symbol belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the association was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the association was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the association */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last modified the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_languages" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language the researcher is associated with */,
  "primary_language" INTEGER /* Indicates if the language is the primary focus of the researcher */,
  "research_focus" TEXT /* Additional details on the research focus related to the language */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the association was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the association was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the association */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last modified the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id", "language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_search_terms" (
  "search_term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search term */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol the search term is associated with */,
  "search_term" TEXT /* Search term */,
  "search_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the search term */,
  "last_search_date" TEXT /* Last date the search term was used */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the search term was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the search term was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the search term */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last modified the search term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_search_terms_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol being downloaded */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who made the download */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date the symbol was downloaded */,
  "download_frequency" INTEGER /* Total number of downloads */,
  "last_download_date" TEXT /* Last date the symbol was downloaded */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the download record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the download record was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the download record */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last modified the download record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_downloads_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_downloads_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol being viewed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who made the view */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the symbol was viewed */,
  "view_frequency" INTEGER /* Total number of views */,
  "last_view_date" TEXT /* Last date the symbol was viewed */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the view record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the view record was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the view record */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last modified the view record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_views_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_views_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)
